Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class FlowTransform

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.FlowBaseElement
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.FlowElement
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.FlowNode
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.FlowTransform
public class FlowTransform extends FlowNode

Java class for FlowTransform complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FlowTransform">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowNode">
       <sequence>
         <element name="apexClass" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="connector" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowConnector" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dataType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowDataType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isCollection" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="objectType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="scale" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="transformValues" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowTransformValue" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getTransformValues

      public List<FlowTransformValue> getTransformValues()
      Gets the value of the transformValues property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the transformValues property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getTransformValues().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FlowTransformValue

      Returns:
      The value of the transformValues property.
